tasks.subject: Task 1: Auto-date when creating tasks in Today view
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When the 'Today' date filter is active, new tasks are pre-populated with today's date.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/tasks/page.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/tasks/AddTaskForm.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Creating a task while 'Today' filter is active saves task with today's date
- [ ] Switching to another filter — new task form has no pre-filled date
- [ ] Switching back to 'Today' — date pre-fills again
- [ ] User can manually clear the pre-filled date before submitting

**Verify:** Manual test — switch to 'Today' filter, open add task form, verify date field shows today's date.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/tasks/page.tsx", "src/components/tasks/AddTaskForm.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "manual", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Creating task in Today view pre-fills today's date", "Switching filters updates the pre-filled date", "User can clear the pre-filled date"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Project reset button in Projects tab header
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add an × button in the accordion header that clears the active project filter without opening the accordion.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/projects/ProjectTabs.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] × button appears in header only when a project is selected
- [ ] Clicking × resets project filter without toggling accordion
- [ ] After reset, header shows just 'Проекты' with no project name

**Verify:** Select a project → × button appears. Click × → project deselected, accordion state unchanged.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/projects/ProjectTabs.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "manual", "acceptanceCriteria": ["× button visible only when project selected", "Click × deselects project", "Accordion does not toggle on × click"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Fix date picker not opening in desktop browsers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace htmlFor label linkage with useRef + .showPicker() so date picker opens reliably on desktop.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/tasks/TaskItem.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Clicking 'Добавить дату' opens native date picker in Chrome/Firefox/Safari desktop
- [ ] Mobile behavior unchanged
- [ ] Clearing date (×) still works

**Verify:** Open task, click 'Добавить дату' in expanded view — native date picker opens in desktop browser.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/tasks/TaskItem.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "manual", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Date picker opens on desktop browser click", "Mobile unchanged", "Clear button works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Double the number of project icons
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Increase icon selection from 36 to ~72 by adding new icons from Lucide React.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/projects/ProjectIconPicker.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Icon picker shows ~72 icons
- [ ] All new icons render correctly
- [ ] Existing projects with old icon keys are unaffected

**Verify:** Open project edit mode — icon picker shows roughly double the icons, all rendering.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/projects/ProjectIconPicker.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "manual", "acceptanceCriteria": ["~72 icons visible in picker", "All icons render", "Existing projects unaffected"]}
```
